summary: Completed regression testing after backend refactoring from monolithic server.py (2035 lines) to 14 modular router files. All 24 backend API tests passed. All 3 frontend pages (homepage, product page, admin login) load correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful: server.py reduced from 2035 lines to ~120 lines
All routers properly organized: auth_routes.py, products.py, cart.py, designs.py, orders.py, payments.py, admin.py, uploads.py, public.py
Admin endpoints return paginated responses with {total, items} structure - working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular routers completed and verified. All 24 API endpoints tested: root, products (list, categories, specific), auth (register, login), cart (get, add, delete), reviews, shipping-settings, discount-code validation, admin 2FA login, admin stats/users/orders/products/payment-settings/settings/discount-codes/logs, nametag PDF, and base64 upload. Frontend pages verified: homepage, product page, admin login.

verified_frontend_pages.Homepage (/): ✓ Loads with Swedish content, product categories visible
verified_frontend_pages.Product page (/produkt/{id}): ✓ Shows product details, price, color options
verified_frontend_pages.Admin login (/admin): ✓ Shows login form with email/password fields
